events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to assess a PEX & copper installation. The observed field condition: "crimp ring fails go/no-go gauge". The work is roughed in, so it's rough-complete stage. The component condition: crimp ring fails inspection, so it is installed-defective and non-compliant. Decision must be fail because it fails the gauge test, which is a code/manufacturer requirement. Risk: high, because a failed crimp could lead to leaks. Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 90%? But they are at rough-complete, which is usually before final inspection, so maybe 70-80%? But they said roughed in, so it's rough-complete. Could be 60-70? I'll estimate 70% complete. Value: no numeric reading given. Confidence: I'm confident, maybe 0.95. Event time, rate, order, sound source, workable: not asked. Findings: "Crimp ring fails go/no-go gauge, indicating improper crimp." Actions: "Cut out defective crimp and re-crimp or replace with proper tool and ring." Rationale: "Crimp ring must pass go/no-go gauge per manufacturer specs and IPC; failure indicates non-compliance." References: "IPC, manufacturer specifications". So JSON.

  "actions": ["Cut out defective crimp connection and re-crimp using proper tool and ring, or replace the connection as per manufacturer instructions."],
  "rationale": "The crimp ring must pass the go/no-go gauge test per manufacturer specifications and IPC requirements. Failure constitutes a non-compliant, defective installation.",
  "references": ["IPC", "manufacturer specifications"]
}
